analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet calls for global solidarity and cooperation to defeat coronavirus and ensure economic recovery, highlighting a Japan–EU leaders' meeting and joint press release. Evaluation: EU1 (EU as a successful story) – not directly; no reference to EU’s historical success or overcoming past obstacles. EU2 (EU is united) – implied only weakly; it mentions EU leaders but focuses on EU–Japan cooperation rather than intra-EU unity, so not sufficiently supported. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – not applicable; no concrete EU policies for citizens are described. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – not shown; no pioneering regulation or leadership claim. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – not about rights/democracy specifically. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – yes; it stresses multilateral cooperation and EU engagement with Japan to tackle a global health crisis and economic recovery, portraying the EU as contributing to global well-being and multilateralism. Conclusion: EU6 applies.
